item.title: Abduction WITNESSED Through Telescope
item.description: A brief look at a reported witness account involving a telescope and Heather Teague.

item.title: Why the Menendez Case Divided a Nation

item.title: The Disturbing Truth Behind Grégory’s Villemin Tragedy
